name: Spinach Bread (Bisquick)
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen spinach, thawed and drained well
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a small loaf pan.
2. Mix all the ingredients together by hand.
3. Pour the mixture into the loaf pan.
4. Bake for 30-45 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit. The bread can be served hot or cold.
